title: Waystone Waypoint Maker
description: Automatically generates waypoints on Xaeros' Minimap when finding Waystones from the Waystones mod
body: Waystone Waypoint Maker (waymaker) will automatically generate waypoints for Xaeros' Minimap when you first activate a waystone from the Waystones mod. Please see the wiki for info and usage. All of my work is licensed under the MIT license. Feel free to use this mod in your modpack; I would appreciate a shout-out if you do.
